name: Full Salt Analysis Procedure
description: Comprehensive 1-minute educational demonstration of Lead Nitrate salt analysis including dry heating, flame test, and wet confirmatory reactions.
subject: Chemistry
educational_goal: Demonstrate visual continuity across multiple scene changes in a single 60-second video.

scene.scene: A close-up shot of a clean glass test tube held by a metallic holder, containing dry white salt powder.
scene.camera: Fixed, close-up centered on test tube

prompt_bundle.image_prompt: A high-quality educational photo of a clean glass test tube held by a metallic holder, containing dry white crystalline powder, neutral grey lab background.
prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: A Bunsen burner blue flame is brought close to the bottom of the test tube, the white powder remains dry and still.

scene.scene: The same glass test tube heated by the burner.
scene.camera: Fixed, close-up centered on test tube

prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: As the powder continues to be heated, the crystals crackle and shift slightly at the bottom of the tube.

scene.scene: The heated glass test tube with evolving gas.
scene.camera: Fixed, close-up centered on test tube

prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: Reddish-brown nitrogen dioxide gas begins to slowly evolve from the heating powder and fill the upper half of the test tube.

scene.scene: A clean platinum wire loop dipped in salt paste held close to a blue burner flame.
scene.camera: Fixed macro view of wire loop and burner
scene.lighting: Dim lab ambient lighting to emphasize flame color

prompt_bundle.image_prompt: A detailed macro photo of a clean platinum wire loop held close to a hot blue Bunsen burner flame, neutral dark background.
prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: The wire loop is slowly moved into the hottest part of the blue burner flame.

scene.scene: Platinum wire loop in the burner flame starting to color.
scene.camera: Fixed macro view of wire loop and flame

prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: The flame color starts to tint with orange-red hues around the platinum loop.

scene.scene: Platinum wire loop showing strong flame test result.
scene.camera: Fixed macro view of wire loop and flame

prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: The burner flame turns a brilliant brick-red/crimson color as the salt completely vaporizes.

scene.scene: A dropper filled with clear potassium iodide solution held above a test tube containing clear salt solution.
scene.camera: Close-up centered on dropper and test tube mouth

prompt_bundle.image_prompt: A clean photo of a glass test tube containing clear aqueous solution, with a plastic dropper filled with clear liquid positioned above the mouth, grey background.
prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: A single drop of clear liquid is released from the dropper and falls towards the solution.

scene.scene: Precipitate forming in the test tube.
scene.camera: Close-up centered on test tube body

prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: As the droplet mixes into the clear solution, a brilliant yellow cloud of precipitate instantly blooms and spreads downwards.

scene.scene: Settled precipitate in the test tube.
scene.camera: Close-up centered on test tube body

prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: The yellow cloud settles, leaving a thick, bright yellow solid precipitate at the bottom of the clear liquid.

scene.scene: A wooden test tube rack holding the three reaction tubes side-by-side.

prompt_bundle.image_prompt: A high-quality photo of a wooden test tube rack on a lab table holding three test tubes: one with dry residue, one with a crimson flame test wire, and one with yellow precipitate.
prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: The camera slowly pans across the rack, showing the three distinct experiment results.
A pair of safety goggles is gently placed on the table next to the test tube rack.

scene.scene: Educational summary blackboard in the background.
scene.camera: Medium shot shifting to the background chalkboard

prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: The camera tilts up to show a chalkboard in the background with balanced chemical equations for lead nitrate heating and precipitation written in white chalk.
